underlying_goal: Debug and improve a train delay notification script, deploy it, then explore and set up a self-hosted dashboard solution
friction_detail: Claude initially almost overwrote a newer repo version with an older server version before catching the mistake via diff inspection
brief_summary: User wanted to debug why their train delay notification script never sent notifications, then improve/deploy it, document versions, and set up a self-hosted dashboard — all goals were achieved including identifying the entity_id slug mismatch bug, deploying improvements to GitHub, and getting Glance running on Tailscale-only access.
